visibility_precondition.capture_precondition: Wait for section#home-hero to be attached and visible after the approved URL reaches domcontentloaded/networkidle.
visibility_precondition.operator_repair_notes: Approved URL inspection found section#home-hero still resolves to exactly one element. At 1440x900 it was visible after page load with a nonzero 1440x776 box, visible CSS, no hidden attribute, and no access/consent blocker observed. Treat the prior visibility failure as load-state sensitive; keep the reviewed locator and add an explicit visible wait before capture retry.
